hook.say: Josh Gad just joined the Ocean's prequel in a major role.
hook.show: Josh Gad just joined the Ocean's prequel in a major role.

lines.say: The actor joins Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper in the new film.
lines.show: The actor joins Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper in the new film.

lines.say: Variety reports Gad has a significant part in the period heist movie.
lines.show: Variety reports Gad has a significant part in the period heist movie.

lines.say: This prequel focuses on Danny Ocean's parents, set in 1962.
lines.show: This prequel focuses on Danny Ocean's parents, set in 1962.

lines.say: Robbie confirmed they pull off an epic heist at the Monaco Grand Prix.

captions.instagram:
Josh Gad is officially in the new Ocean's prequel alongside Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper! He's got a big role in this 1962 heist film about Danny Ocean's parents. Get all the details on this starry cast and the epic Monaco Grand Prix heist!

#OceansPrequel #JoshGad #MargotRobbie #BradleyCooper #HollywoodNews #MovieNews #ComingSoon #HeistMovie #ScreenReport
captions.facebook: Big news for Ocean's fans! Josh Gad has joined the cast of the upcoming prequel, starring Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper. This one's all about Danny Ocean's parents in 1962, pulling off a massive heist. Are you excited for this new take on the franchise?

pinterest.title: Josh Gad Joins Margot Robbie & Bradley Cooper in Ocean's Prequel
pinterest.description: Josh Gad takes a significant role in the new Ocean's prequel, set in 1962 and featuring Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper. Discover details about Danny Ocean's parents and their Monaco Grand Prix heist. Release expected June 2027. #OceansPrequel #JoshGad #MargotRobbie #BradleyCooper #MovieNews

youtube.title: Josh Gad Cast in Ocean's Prequel with Robbie & Cooper | #Shorts
youtube.description: Josh Gad joins Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper in the Ocean's prequel! Set in 1962, it follows Danny Ocean's parents. Directed by Cooper, coming June 2027.

captions.x: Josh Gad is in the new Ocean's prequel alongside Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper! He's playing a big role in this 1962 heist about Danny Ocean's parents. #OceansPrequel #JoshGad

spoken: Josh Gad just joined the Ocean's prequel in a major role. The actor joins Margot Robbie and Bradley Cooper in the new film. Variety reports Gad has a significant part in the period heist movie. This prequel focuses on Danny Ocean's parents, set in 1962. Robbie confirmed they pull off an epic heist at the Monaco Grand Prix. Bradley Cooper co-stars, directs, and wrote the screenplay. The film hits theaters in June 2027. Full story at The Screen Report — link in bio.
